criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app analytics, download statistics.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Measures taken by the app to protect user data and ensure secure communication.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, user feedback.

criteria.name: Feature Richness
criteria.description: The variety and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction based on reviews and ratings.
criteria.sources: App store ratings, user reviews, surveys.
